scripts.clean: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/webos4 && mkdir -p dist/webos6
scripts.build: npm run clean && cp public/* dist && npm run build-4 && npm run build-6 && cp -rf webos-4/build/* dist/webos4/ && cp -rf webos-6/dist/* dist/webos6
scripts.webos:emu: npm run build && npm run package && ares-install com.willinux.tvh.app_${npm_package_version}_all.ipk -d emulator && ares-launch com.willinux.tvh.app -d emulator
scripts.webos:tv: npm run build && npm run package && ares-install com.willinux.tvh.app_${npm_package_version}_all.ipk -d tv && ares-launch com.willinux.tvh.app -d tv
